economic_mechanism: Test repeated, measurable exposure mechanisms with outcome-independent specificity controls and dependence-aware inference. Decision one tested broad-index overnight selling absorbed intraday; decision two tested direct official 2s10s bull steepening as a regional-bank funding/lending tailwind.
forecast_type: free multi-mechanism direction, volatility, or time-bias discovery with one named decision per wake
candidate_or_family_scope: Decision one closed BROAD_INDEX_OVERNIGHT_ABSORPTION_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / BROAD_INDEX_OVERNIGHT_SELL_INTRADAY_ABSORPTION_FORWARD_UPDRIFT after negative absolute, paired, uncertainty, and tail evidence. Decision two closed OFFICIAL_2S10S_BULL_STEEPENING_KRE_BULL_CALL_21D_V1 / OFFICIAL_YIELD_CURVE_BULL_STEEPENING_REGIONAL_BANK_RELATIVE_UPDRIFT because seven total signals produced only four train episodes across 2009 and 2024, including three of four in 2024. Future epoch decisions must pivot to a materially different mechanism or evidence class, not salvage either exact family.
falsifier: Each wake must close its predeclared named candidate or family under frozen chronology, control, density, uncertainty, tail, integrity, capital, and authority boundaries. Two consecutive counted wakes without STRATEGY_ADVANCED require a materially different mechanism/evidence-class pivot; three require burst stop and reassessment.
epoch_success_definition: Advance one named candidate at least from F0_MECHANISM to F1_TRAIN under its frozen discovery bar while preserving sealed holdout identities and claim-appropriate authority boundaries; capability or plumbing alone is not success.
next_seed: MULTI_ISSUER_DIVIDEND_INCREASE_FORWARD_UPDRIFT_F0: pivot to a materially different issuer cash-flow-confidence mechanism. Before outcomes, freeze a point-in-time regular-dividend increase definition, fixed multi-issuer panel and same-date sector controls, chronology, density/year/issuer breadth, uncertainty, hit-rate, tail, integrity, sealed holdout, and future defined-risk planning boundaries. Existing dividend provenance and assignment tooling is infrastructure, not edge evidence. Close exactly one F0 advance-or-family-close decision without yield-curve salvage.
